creator: c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
text:
Just a note:

I did not add an option to disable mDNS, even though I was hoping for a 
way. Hplip has no configure arg to disable support for mdns so it's a 
required dep. This is a pita as I hate mdns, but I also need a working 
printer so.

Just if you are wondering why I did not do this.
